text:
(a) The board may conduct hearings in contested cases brought under this chapter as provided by this chapter and Chapter 2301 (Sale or Lease of Motor Vehicles) , Occupations Code.

(b) The procedures applicable to a hearing conducted under this section are those applicable to a hearing conducted under Chapter 2301 (Sale or Lease of Motor Vehicles) , Occupations Code, or Chapter 2001 (Administrative Procedure) , Government Code.

(c) A decision or final order issued under this section is final and may not be appealed, as a matter of right, to the board.

(d) The board may adopt rules for the procedure, a hearing, or an enforcement proceeding for an action brought under this section.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 503. Dealer's & Mfr.'s Vehicle License Plates
##### § 503.009 — Procedure for Certain Contested Cases

(a) The board may conduct hearings in contested cases brought under this chapter as provided by this chapter and Chapter 2301 (Sale or Lease of Motor Vehicles) , Occupations Code.

(b) The procedures applicable to a hearing conducted under this section are those applicable to a hearing conducted under Chapter 2301 (Sale or Lease of Motor Vehicles) , Occupations Code, or Chapter 2001 (Administrative Procedure) , Government Code.

(c) A decision or final order issued under this section is final and may not be appealed, as a matter of right, to the board.

(d) The board may adopt rules for the procedure, a hearing, or an enforcement proceeding for an action brought under this section.

*Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 276 (H.B.3514), Sec. 11, eff. September 1, 2021.*
